creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Scenario:
- FreeBSD 12.3 and 13.1 release latest, amd64 and i386
- ports latest
- Upgrading ports using portmaster
- /etc/make.conf contains "WRKDIRPREFIX=/usr/tmp" which is normally respected by all ports

Result:
- Upgrading net/rclone to rclone-1.59.0_1 creates a huge directory structure in /usr/ports/distfiles/go/net_rclone
- After the build is finished, this directory is not deleted
- It does not create the ususal build directory in /usr/tmp/ports/net/rclone

Expected result:
- The build should be performed in /usr/tmp/ports/net/rclone, and this should be deleted after the build

-- Martin
